tasks.label: kill port 19876
tasks.command: $p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 19876 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Output 'killed existing backend' } else { Write-Output 'port 19876 free' }

tasks.label: start backend (replay)
tasks.command: $repo='${workspaceFolder}'; $art=$env:ARTIFACTS_PATH; if (-not $art -and (Test-Path "$repo\.env")) { foreach ($line in Get-Content "$repo\.env") { if ($line -match '^\s*ARTIFACTS_PATH\s*=\s*[''"]?([^''"#]+)[''"]?\s*(?:#.*)?$') { $art=$Matches[1].Trim(); break } } }; if (-not $art) { $art='artifacts' }; if (-not [System.IO.Path]::IsPathRooted($art)) { $art=Join-Path $repo $art }; $catalog=Join-Path $art 'jquants-catalog'; uv run python -m engine --token testtoken --jquants-catalog-path $catalog

tasks.label: stop backend (replay)
tasks.command: $p = (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 19876 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Output 'backend stopped' } else { Write-Output 'backend already stopped' }
